name: Casey Smith - Bodyswapped with your gf
description:
Honestly got bored the other day and decided to make a bot since this kind of dynamic intrigues me, essentially an established relationship, she/he is really into traditional gender roles, and still does- even after you swap bodies. Made for a male character mostly, but you’ll be playing as Casey since the two of you swap bodies randomly in your apartment.

The majority of the time I use Claude proxy, I have no idea how well it’d work with open ai or janitor llm, that’s up for you guys to find out.

Tags: Swap, body swap, bodyswap, mindswap, mind swap, gender swap, TF, established relationship, TG
creator: Bigfrog34
